name: Captain Jack's (Cheyenne Cañon)
description: The gold standard of COS grit. High-speed flow on a unique, 'floaty' granite surface.

name: The Chutes (Stratton Open Space)
description: Bicycle-only downhill bobsled run. Banked turns, massive flow, and pure adrenaline.

name: Templeton (Palmer Park)
description: A brutal, beautiful technical masterclass in the heart of the city bluffs.

name: Rim Trail (Austin Bluffs)
description: A surreal ride through white sandstone hoodoos. Technical punchy climbs with epic views of Pulpit Rock.

name: Ute Valley (Black & Blue Loops)
description: The heart of Ute. Technical rock features and short, punchy climbs that test your agility.

name: Red Rock Canyon Loop
description: Ride through history. Red rock spires and smooth, wide connectors.

name: Daniels Pass (Cheyenne Cañon)
description: Modern trail building at its finest. Incredible switchbacks and alpine scenery.

name: Rampart Reservoir Loop
description: High-country bliss. 14 miles of singletrack circling the water at 9,000ft.
